title: Instructor Registration and Login
description: The system shall allow an instructor to create an account with required details, log in with valid credentials, and be redirected to their personal dashboard.
rationale: This requirement ensures that instructors can access the necessary tools for managing courses and monitoring student progress efficiently.
business_value: By enabling instructors to register and log in, the system enhances productivity and allows for better tracking of course enrollment and student performance.

source.description: As a instructor I need to register and log in to a personal dashboard that shows active exams, enrollment counts, and competency coverage so that I can manage my courses and monitor student progress efficiently.

acceptance_criteria: An instructor can create an account with required details when accessing the registration page.
An instructor is redirected to their personal dashboard upon logging in with valid credentials.
An instructor sees active exams, enrollment counts, and competency coverage when viewing their dashboard.
preconditions: Instructor is not registered (for registration feature).
Instructor has registered and knows valid credentials (for login feature).
Instructor is on their personal dashboard.
postconditions: An instructor's account is created with required details.
An instructor logs in successfully and is redirected to the dashboard.
The dashboard displays active exams, enrollment counts, and competency coverage.
security_requirements: Strong authentication mechanism for user accounts.

non_functional_requirements.performance: Dashboard updates in real-time or near real-time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: System should handle an increase in the number of registered instructors and students without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Clear and intuitive interface for easy navigation and data interpretation.

edge_cases: What happens if an instructor tries to register with existing credentials?
How does the system handle a sudden surge in user activity?
What actions should be taken if a user attempts to log in from an unrecognized device?

interfaces.name: Registration API
interfaces.description: Handles the creation of new instructor accounts.

interfaces.name: Login API
interfaces.description: Authenticates user credentials and returns a session token.

interfaces.name: User Database
interfaces.description: Stores user information including login details and dashboard data.

interfaces.name: Dashboard UI
interfaces.description: Displays active exams, enrollment counts, and competency coverage.

test_cases.description: Instructor tries to register with existing credentials.
test_cases.expected_result: System displays an error message indicating that the account already exists.

test_cases.description: User attempts to log in from an unrecognized device.
test_cases.expected_result: System prompts for a second factor authentication or blocks access after several failed attempts.
